experiment: ENAQT + Lindblad Sink — Bloch Equation Analysis

model.bath: Pure dephasing, Lindblad σ_z, rate γ_φ
model.sink: Irreversible RC extraction from site 2, rate κ
model.fluorescence: Recombination from all sites, rate Γ
model.method: Exact analytical yield via matrix inversion (Laplace transform)

key_results.conclusion: Sink + energy bias together unlock orders-of-magnitude stronger ENAQT
